title: Radioactive waste burning by nuclear transmutation: CoRWM position paper
body: "The Committee on Radioactive Waste Management (CoRWM) investigates the feasibility of proposed ‘waste burning’ reactors in the UK. These technologies are designed to reduce the amount of long-lived radioactive waste present in spent nuclear fuel.    This work is in 2 parts:   the first paper gives a brief background and summarises main considerations for ‘waste burner’ reactors in the UK the second is a technical report which discusses the details of waste burning schemes and their implications for waste management, and presents conclusions and recommendations   "

taxons.title: Radioactive and nuclear substances and waste
